problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Synaptic. Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
